entities.name: MG-2
entities.context: System component that attempted to generate intelligence from meeting transcript

entities.name: Minimal Block Protocol
entities.context: Practice of creating explicit records when insufficient data exists rather than inventing content

entities.name: Anti-Hallucination Principle
entities.context: Design principle that the system avoids inventing content not present in source data

relationships.context: MG-2 follows the principle by not generating fake key moments when transcript is insufficient
Minimal blocks serve as explicit records acknowledging data gaps rather than fabricating content
